message.description: The message to send to the AI.

chat_uuid.description: UUID of an existing chat to continue. Creates a new chat if omitted.

url.description: URL where the chat is initiated from.

email.description: Email or ID for conversation tracking in analytics.

think_mode.description: Enable reasoning mode for deeper analysis. Requires the reasoning mode plugin to be enabled for the project.

metadata.description: Tag to identify the conversation source (e.g., `mcp`, `slack`, `web`).
